findings.text: Email sent by Kathleen Donnelly on behalf of fees@napier.ac.uk to Anfal Elbushra on 08/04/2026.
Email notifies recipient of arrears and requests payment receipts if already paid.

proposed_artifacts.content:
Outlook

Accommodation Arrears - Urgent attention required

From Donnelly, Kathleen <K.Donnelly@napier.ac.uk>
     on behalf of
     fees <fees@napier.ac.uk>
Date Wed 08/04/2026 13:29
To   Elbushra, Anfal <40805511@live.napier.ac.uk>
Cc   albshryanfal4@gmail.com <albshryanfal4@gmail.com>


Hi Anfal

It has come to our attention that you are in arrears for your accommodation. The payments have not
been collected from your card each month and unfortunately the arrears have not been picked up before
now.
If you have made payments, please send copies of your receipts.
The outstanding arrears for your accommodation are £4605.55
Payment can be made by debit or credit card:
Paying your fees

If you need any additional help with funding, please contact Studentfunding@napier.ac.uk


Kind Regards
Kathleen

Kathleen Donnelly
Senior Finance Assistant
Edinburgh Napier University
Finance
Sighthill Campus
Sighthill Court
Edinburgh EH11 4BN
Tel 0131 455 6806
Edinburgh Napier University is a registered Scottish charity. Registration number SC018373
